# Weekly Curation Digest
**Date:** June 8, 2026
**Target Audience:** Enterprise Consultants, ML Engineers, and Architects
**Model Used:** openai/gpt-4o
**Filter State:** No Temporal Filters

## 1. Executive Summary
This week's signal is dominated by the **agentic AI infrastructure pivot** — Microsoft (Scout, Project Solara, MAI-Thinking-1), Google (Gemini Omni/3.5), and Alibaba (Qwen3.7-Plus) all shipped agent-first platforms, while enterprises like Travelers and Uber are confronting the real-wo...
